questions.q: Which companies and funds are reportedly involved in a $24 billion deal, as of April 6, 2026?
options: Paramount Skydance and funds from Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Abu Dhabi for a Warner Bros. Deal
Netflix and a consortium of private equity firms
Universal Pictures and sovereign wealth funds from Asia
questions.correctText: Paramount Skydance has reportedly secured $24 billion from Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Abu Dhabi funds for a Warner Bros. deal.

questions.q: As of April 6, 2026, what is the approximate share of the dollar in global foreign exchange reserves, marking its lowest level since 1994?
questions.correctText: The dollar’s share of global foreign exchange reserves has fallen to roughly 57%, its lowest level since 1994, down from 71% at the start of 1999.

questions.q: According to recent reports from April 6, 2026, why did Valve co-founder Gabe Newell reportedly 'step back' from making games after Portal 2?
options: Everyone kept agreeing with his ideas, hindering creative collaboration.
He wanted to focus on Steam's development.
He retired from the gaming industry.
He disagreed with the company's direction.
questions.correctText: Gabe Newell 'stepped back' from making games at Valve after Portal 2 because everyone kept agreeing with him when he wanted 'to be part of the team and come up with ideas'.

questions.q: As of April 6, 2026, foreign central banks have been net sellers of US Treasuries for five consecutive weeks, leading to a drop in holdings at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York to what approximate level, the lowest since 2012?
questions.correctText: Holdings at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York have dropped by roughly US$82 billion to US$2.7 trillion, the lowest level since 2012, due to foreign central banks being net sellers of Treasuries for five consecutive weeks.

questions.q: As of April 6, 2026, what was the approximate trading price of Bitcoin, following a 2.75% gain in 24 hours?
questions.correctText: As of April 6, 2026, Bitcoin was trading at $68,836 with a 2.75% gain in just 24 hours.
